recommendations.title: Hustlers
recommendations.overview: A crew of savvy former strip club employees band together to turn the tables on their Wall Street clients.

recommendations.title: Mad Money
recommendations.overview: Three female employees of the Federal Reserve plot to steal money that is about to be destroyed.

recommendations.title: Geri's Game
recommendations.overview: An aging codger named Geri plays a daylong game of chess in the park against himself. Somehow, he begins losing to his livelier opponent. But just when the game's nearly over, Geri manages to turn the tables.

recommendations.title: Father Figures
recommendations.overview: Upon learning that their mother has been lying to them for years about their allegedly deceased father, two fraternal twin brothers hit the road in order to find him.

recommendations.title: The Invention of Lying
recommendations.overview: Set in a world where the concept of lying doesn't exist, a loser changes his lot when he invents lying and uses it to get ahead.

recommendations.title: The Ferpect Crime
recommendations.overview: A playboy has the tables turned on him when he finds himself being used as a plaything by an undesirable woman.

recommendations.title: Libeled Lady
recommendations.overview: When a major newspaper accuses wealthy socialite Connie Allenbury of being a home-wrecker, and she files a multi-million-dollar libel lawsuit, the publication's frazzled head editor, Warren Haggerty, must find a way to turn the tables on her. Soon Ha

recommendations.title: Derailed
recommendations.overview: When two married business executives having an affair are blackmailed by a violent criminal, they are forced to turn the tables on him to save their families.

recommendations.title: Elections Day
recommendations.overview: The employees of a radio station in Moscow are forced to organize the elections campaign for a future governor in one of Russia districts.

recommendations.title: Scorched
recommendations.overview: Three mischievous employees of a bank in a small deserted town all make plans to rob it at the same time, however none of them knows about the others.
